events.title: The Learning Lab
events.summary: Multi-week training programme on dispute resolution processes including arbitration and mediation run by the Chartered Institute of Arbitrators.

events.title: The Learning Lab
events.summary: Multi-session online training programme covering fundamentals of arbitration, mediation and alternative dispute resolution methods for practitioners.

events.title: CanArbWeek Young Members Social
events.summary: Afternoon social networking event for young arbitration practitioners with drinks and canapés, following main CanArbWeek programming.

events.title: Young ICCA Workshop on Oral Advocacy
events.summary: Interactive skills training workshop focused on oral advocacy techniques for young arbitration practitioners, scholars and students in Rome.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Rome
events.summary: LCIA symposium during Italian Arbitration Day following the traditional Tylney-style format. Topics submitted by delegates in advance for interactive discussion.

events.title: Chief Litigation Officer Summit 2026 | June
events.summary: Invitation-only forum for senior litigation executives and solution providers. Focuses on strategies shaping litigation leadership in an increasingly complex legal environment.

events.title: Chief Litigation Officer Summit 2026
events.summary: Invitation-only summit for senior litigation leaders and solution providers at Park Hyatt Aviara Resort. Connects litigation executives with insights and strategies shaping the field.

events.title: Arbitration & ADR Masterclass
events.summary: Educational masterclass providing practical training on arbitration and alternative dispute resolution techniques, procedures, and case studies for practitioners.

events.title: Faster, Leaner, Smarter: Procedures and Tactics for Streamlining Arbitration
events.summary: Masterclass on effective procedures and tactical approaches to streamline arbitration processes. Practical session covering techniques to make arbitration faster and more cost-efficient. Hosted at White & Case offices in London.

events.title: Roebuck Lecture 2026
events.summary: Annual Roebuck Lecture hosted by the Chartered Institute of Arbitrators, a flagship event in the dispute resolution calendar.

events.title: Roebuck Lecture 2026
events.summary: Annual flagship lecture by the Chartered Institute of Arbitrators examining contemporary issues in arbitration and dispute resolution.

events.title: The State of Expert Witness Evidence: Exclusive insights from Ciarb's global study
events.summary: Webinar presenting findings from CIArb's global research on expert witness evidence practices in arbitration and litigation proceedings worldwide.

events.title: Arbitration and ADR Committee Meeting
events.summary: Private committee meeting for ICC UK Arbitration and ADR members. Invitation-only session for committee members to discuss arbitration and alternative dispute resolution matters. Contact arbitration@iccwbo.uk for access.

events.title: ACI's Forum on Cartels, TCOs & Compliance in Latin America
events.summary: Forum addressing cartels, transnational criminal organisations, and compliance challenges for companies and financial institutions operating in Latin America. Features enforcement officials and in-house counsel.

events.title: 43rd Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.organiser: Cambridge International Symposium on Economic Crime
events.summary: Week-long symposium at Jesus College covering economic crime, including fraud, AML, bribery, and enforcement. Participants can attend the full week or individual days, with sessions, meals, and networking included.

events.title: From Positions to Outcomes: Negotiation in Practice – a Young ICCA Skills Workshop
events.summary: Practical skills workshop on negotiation techniques and strategies for arbitration practitioners, covering transition from positions to outcomes.

events.title: LCIA Seminar in Singapore
events.summary: Part of Singapore Convention Week. Seminar featuring LCIA Rules introduction, panel discussion, and interactive forum with networking reception.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Singapore
events.summary: Symposium during Singapore Convention Week following LCIA's Tylney-style format. Interactive discussions based on topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: LCIA Tylney Hall Symposia
events.summary: Two-day symposium at Tylney Hall following long-established LCIA tradition of open forum discussion. Topics submitted by delegates. Flagship event in the LCIA calendar.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: Half-day symposium preceding the LCIA Tylney Hall Symposium featuring open forum discussion based on delegate-submitted topics.

events.title: Arbitration and ADR Committee Meeting
events.summary: Private committee meeting for ICC UK Arbitration and ADR members. Invitation-only session for committee members to discuss arbitration and dispute resolution matters. Contact arbitration@iccwbo.uk for details.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Berlin
events.summary: Symposium during Berlin Dispute Resolution Days following traditional Tylney-style format. Interactive discussions based on topics submitted by delegates.

events.title: Istanbul Arbitration Days
events.summary: Multi-day arbitration conference and events in Istanbul. LCIA supporting organisation for this regional arbitration gathering in Turkey.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Copenhagen
events.summary: LCIA symposium following traditional Tylney-style format with topics submitted by delegates in advance for open forum discussion.

events.title: Annual Arbitration & ADR Conference
events.summary: Two-day flagship conference covering current developments in international arbitration and alternative dispute resolution, featuring leading practitioners and arbitrators.

events.title: Annual Arbitration & ADR Conference
events.summary: Flagship annual conference covering current developments, emerging trends, and practical insights in international arbitration and alternative dispute resolution at EY London.

events.title: Dispute Resolution in a Geopolitical World
events.summary: ICC UK's annual arbitration and ADR conference examining dispute resolution in the context of current geopolitical tensions. Full-day conference at EY offices covering international arbitration, mediation and alternative dispute resolution.

events.title: LCIA - AIEN Joint Conference: Dispute Resolution in the International Energy Business
events.summary: Two-day conference on energy dispute resolution featuring leading advocates, counsel, experts and arbitrators. Interactive format with panels, presentations, interviews, roundtables and Q&A sessions.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in New York
events.summary: Interactive symposium during New York Arbitration Week. Topics and format follow LCIA traditions for open discussion among arbitration practitioners.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposium in Miami
events.summary: Interactive half-day symposium during Miami Arbitration Week concluding with cocktail reception. Follows LCIA's Tylney-style format for open forum discussion.

events.title: LCIA Symposium in London
events.summary: Full-day symposium during London Arbitration Week following long-established LCIA tradition of open forum discussion. Topics submitted by delegates in advance.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: Half-day symposium preceding the LCIA Tylney Hall Symposium featuring open forum discussion based on delegate-submitted topics.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: Half-day symposium preceding the LCIA Tylney Hall Symposium featuring open forum discussion based on delegate-submitted topics.
